title: lomatium insulare
intro: Lomatium insulare, also known as Island Biscuit Root, is a perennial plant native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help to fight off infections and reduce inflammation. The plant's health benefits include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can help to combat fungal and bacterial infections. In herbal preparations, Lomatium insulare is often used in tinctures, capsules, and teas, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
